message:
fix(tests): update tui_state tests for model selector wording and flaky pagination

- make_model_entry now sets api_key by default so tests reflect the
  common "configured" state; tests needing unconfigured models
  explicitly clear it.
- Add retry loop in large-diff truncation test to handle viewport
  pagination variability instead of assuming fixed scroll position.
- Update three assertion strings to match the new model selector
  copy: "ready to use" replaces "configured API keys" and the
  empty-state message is now "No matching models."

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
